---
title: "Using Earth Engine with irg"
author: "Alec L. Robitaille"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Vignette Title}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# Sampling

```{js}
// ## Extract NDVI for IRG 
// # Alec Robitaille
// # November 2018

// ## Image Import
// NDVI
var ndvi = ee.ImageCollection('MODIS/006/MOD13Q1');


// ## Feature Collection Import
// Points
var points = ee.FeatureCollection('users/alr201/IRG/48hr-caribou');

// ## Filter
ndvi = ndvi.filter(ee.Filter.calendarRange(2007, 2013, 'year'));

// ## Add year
var addYear = function(img) {
  return(img.addBands(ee.Image(img.date().get('year')).rename('yr')));
};

ndvi = ndvi.map(addYear);

// ## Sample
var samplePts = function(img) {
  return img.reduceRegions(points, ee.Reducer.mean())
            .copyProperties(points);
};

var reduced = ndvi.map(samplePts)
									.flatten()
									.filter(ee.Filter.neq('NDVI', null));

// ## Export
var outputString  = '48hr-2007-2013-NDVI-caribou';
Export.table.toDrive(reduced, outputString, 'IRG');
```

# Quantiles in EE

*note: currently this uses 0.3 and 0.93 instead of 0.25 and 0.925* 

```{js}
// ## Just quantiles for IRG 
// # Alec Robitaille
// # December 2018

// ## Image Import
// NDVI
var ndvi = ee.ImageCollection('MODIS/006/MOD13Q1');


// ## Feature Collection Import
// Points
var points = ee.FeatureCollection('users/alr201/IRG/48hr-caribou').limit(2);

// ## Filter
ndvi = ndvi.filter(ee.Filter.calendarRange(2007, 2013, 'year'));

// ## Mask
var qaMask = function(img) {
  var qa = img.select('SummaryQA');
  return img.updateMask(qa.lt(2));
};

ndvi = ndvi.map(qaMask);

// ## Quantiles
ndvi = ndvi.select('NDVI').reduce(ee.Reducer.percentile([2.5, 92.5]));

// ## Sample
var reduced = ndvi.reduceRegions(points.limit(10), ee.Reducer.mean(), 30)
                  .copyProperties(points.limit(10));

// ## Export
var outputString  = '48hr-2007-2013-NDVI-caribou';
Export.table.toDrive(reduced, outputString, 'IRG');

// ## Map
Map.addLayer(ndvi.select('NDVI_p3'), null, 'winter');
Map.addLayer(ndvi.select('NDVI_p93'), null, 'top');
Map.addLayer(ndvi, null, 'both');
```
